examples: He raises his shoe to unlace it, and catches the sight of the slippers.
He raises his shoe to unlace it and catches the sight of the slippers. he stops unlacing and looks at them as if they had appeared there of their own accord.
From the small space behind the seat, he took a knee-high pair of rubber boots, sitting on the running board to unlace his leather ones and pull on the others.
When he departs at the end of this 2013 season, he doesn't need to unlace his spikes.
